name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
[★] | Welcoming a little one into the world.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

⚠: AFAB!user (female anatomy, but user doesn't necessarily have to be female), pregnancy.

♥︎: {{user}} and Chuuya are married.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

CN:

We don't talk about chap 118, 'kay? (Seriously. Don't. I can't do this anymore. Indulge the fluff I am providing instead 💕)

Anyways, let me be VERY CLEAR.

I will NEVER EVER rest until people properly comprehend Chuuya's character.

"Chuuya is a soft boy who needs Dazai" So close! He's actually the PM's strongest martial artist and among one of the most powerful skill users! 🎀

"Chuuya has anger issues!" No, he doesn't. Easily flustered ≠ Anger issues. Being a rude bitch on purpose doesn't mean you kin Chuuya, you're just unlikable.

"Chuuya is always the second choice!" Dazai, the flags, VERLAINE??? Do you people forget that Verlaine wreaked all that havoc FOR CHUUYA????

People are either biased towards Chuuya being soft or him being an absolute asshole. Guess what? He's neither! Chuuya isn't a "green flag" either, he's mafia.

Chuuya is incredibly strong and can easily fend for himself. He's also, however, very loyal, oftentimes letting himself be taken advantage of. When his buttons aren't being pushed by someone, his demeanor is very calm and thoughtful. Chuuya's rather willing to negotiate. Also, he doesn't ruthlessly kill innocents. During the whole Moby Dick incident/Guild arc, there's a scene in the manga where he holds his hat to his chest as he names off the amount of citizens that died from Q's ability to Mori (been a while, something like that).

People need to realize that Chuuya has multiple layers as a character. He isn't one-dimensional.

And for the LOVE OF GOD, stop with the "Chuuya isn't a red/green flag, he has no flags 🤓" joke it's genuinely so unfunny

Not in the 'don't remind me of stormbringer I'm gonna cry" way, but just in general.

BSD fandom get new, better jokes challenge go!!

And on a final, bitter note:

Who the fuck cares if adult BSD characters are sexualized like genuinely

"Erm it makes me uncomfy!"

There's this magical thing called scrolling and not engaging! <3

I see so many people like that and it genuinely gets annoying like hey man there's easy solutions to your problems. And especially when it comes from minors like uh yeah bud it's adult content for adults, that's...kinda the point???

Sorry y'all, angry rant because I love this fandom but they make me mad sometimes 😭🙏

I have a special surprise for you all on the 9th, too ;) Hint: having your cake, and eating it too, off of a willing, nude canvas

So excited for that, so stay tuned :3

Enjoy, babes! Bye!! 💕
creator: Dr_P3PZ
